entity_data.ocr_text:
Até 30 de abril

Todo dia tem opções deliciosas com preço especial.

Prato do Chef R$ 70
entity_data.img_caption:
The image is an advertisement for a restaurant, specifically Almeida Junior, promoting a special offer. The background is a light beige color with a decorative plate featuring sushi and a salad at the top left corner. The sushi consists of several pieces of sushi rolls, including what appears to be salmon and avocado, arranged neatly on a plate with a red floral design.

The main text in the center of the image reads "Até 30 de abril," which translates to "Until April 30th." Below this, there is a statement in Portuguese: "Todo dia tem opções deliciosas com preço especial," meaning "Every day has delicious options with special prices."

At the bottom of the image, there are two sections with different colors and text:
1. A pink section with white text that says "Prato do Chef," which translates to "Chef's Dish."
2. A black section with white text displaying the price "R$ 70," indicating the cost of the Chef's Dish is 70 reais.

The overall design is clean and visually appealing, focusing on the promotion of the special offer until April 30th.

The image is an advertisement for "Circuito Gastronômico" at Balneário Shopping, as indicated by the text at the top of the image. The background is a soft, light pink color.

At the center of the image, there is a circular plate divided into four sections, each containing different types of food:

1. **Top Left Section**: Contains a serving of French fries.
2. **Top Right Section**: Features slices of sushi, including pieces of salmon and other ingredients wrapped in seaweed.
3. **Bottom Left Section**: Displays a piece of grilled steak with visible grill marks.
4. **Bottom Right Section**: Contains a salad with leafy greens, cherry tomatoes, and possibly some dressing or sauce.

The text "CIRCUITO GASTRONÔMICO" is prominently displayed in large, bold letters at the top of the image, with "BALNEÁRIO Shopping" written below it in a smaller font. The overall design is clean and visually appealing, highlighting the variety of food options available at the shopping center.

SEU HAPPY HOUR É NO
Balneário Shopping
entity_data.img_caption: The image shows a group of people toasting with champagne glasses at a table. The focus is on the hands and glasses, with the background slightly blurred. The text overlay in Portuguese reads "SEU HAPPY HOUR É NO Balneário Shopping," which translates to "YOUR HAPPY HOUR IS AT Balneário Shopping." The setting appears to be a social gathering or event, possibly at a shopping mall named Balneário Shopping.

The image depicts a dining setup featuring a variety of Japanese cuisine items on a wooden table. The main focus is on a small, rectangular plate with a light blue base, containing a piece of unagi (grilled eel) wrapped in nori (seaweed). Next to it, there is a small bowl filled with what appears to be pickled ginger and wasabi. 

In the center of the table, there is a small bowl containing a colorful assortment of seafood tempura, including shrimp and possibly other vegetables, garnished with a slice of lime. To the left of the tempura bowl, there is a small dish with a light-colored, possibly rice-based food item.

A glass of a light-colored beverage, likely a lemonade or iced tea, is placed next to the main plate. The drink has a straw and is garnished with a slice of orange and a sprig of mint.

In the foreground, there is a white paper napkin with the text "UNIZUSHI" printed on it, along with some Japanese characters below it. The background shows a row of wooden chairs and tables, suggesting that this is a restaurant setting. The overall presentation is clean and appetizing, typical of a high-quality sushi restaurant.

The image shows a woman sitting at a table in what appears to be a restaurant or café. She is wearing a sleeveless pink dress and has her hands placed on her cheeks, possibly in a gesture of surprise or excitement. In front of her on the table is a plate with a meal that includes a steak, a serving of rice, and some fried potatoes. There is also a drink with a slice of lime and a red beverage, likely a cocktail.

The background features other tables and chairs, suggesting a casual dining setting. The text overlay on the image reads "COMIDA CIRCUITO GASTRONÔMICO BALNEÁRIO SHOPPING," which translates to "Food Circuit Gastronomic Balneario Shopping." This indicates that the image is likely from a social media post or a promotional material for a food tour or event at the Balneario Shopping mall.

The image shows a person outdoors, likely in a park or garden setting with green foliage in the background. The individual is wearing a navy blue sleeveless top with a white logo on the left side and bright orange shorts. They have a cheerful expression, with their mouth open as if laughing or shouting. In their right hand, they are holding an orange balloon with a white symbol resembling a stylized "Y" or "V." The person is also wearing a necklace with small pendants and has a watch on their left wrist. The overall scene suggests a casual, joyful moment.

entity_data.publication_caption: Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Visitei o Unizushi, que está participando do Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping e me apaixonei! 🍣  Menu completo (entrada, prato principal e sobremesa) por R$70,00. Ambiente aconchegante, atendimento ótimo… me senti em casa.  O festival vai até 30/04, e além do Unizushi  os outros restaurantes participantes são: Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. então corre pra aproveitar! 🎉

Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

Essa semana foi dia de experimentar o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping.  São vários restaurantes participando com pratos de R$70,00 no almoço e na janta. E aí, em qual vocês vão primeiro?  Corre que é até dia 30 de Abril
